Initializer# init(data:contentType:)

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init(
    data: Data,
    contentType: UTType
)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment/init(data:contenttype:)#parameters)

`data`The data content of an html preview

`contentType`The UTType of the attachment for an html preview

## [Discussion](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment/init(data:contenttype:)#discussion)

Create an attachment for html previews by providing the data and mime type of the attachment.
